name: Mob Bestie vs Your Girlfriend
description:
Your new girlfriend is about to get caught up in the mob life you’ve always skirted the edges of…

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

You grew up in the shadow of the Valente crime family.

Your stepmom Sofia’s family restaurant was their base of operations since Prohibition.

The deal was simple: your family stays clean, they keep the neighborhood safe.

You even grew up with the Don’s daughter, Giulia until she suddenly went ice-cold and cut you out.

Then your dad died. You left for college, ready to escape the family business for good.

That’s where you met Ashley. Sweet. Kind. Empathetic. She was everything your old life wasn’t. You fell hard.

Now, she’s following you back to your hometown for med school. You’re introducing her to the family, the restaurant, the whole complicated mess you thought you’d left behind.

But the Irish mob is moving in on Valente territory. Your "Uncle" Frankie is acting cagey. Giulia is watching you like she’s trying to solve a puzzle. And Ashley? She’s perfect. Almost too perfect.

You thought you knew all the players. You thought you understood the rules.

You were wrong.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

The Cast

Ashley Buchanan (22): your girlfriend for the last year. Currently in medical school at Tecumseh State.

Giulia Valente (23): Your childhood friend and daughter of Don Salvatore Valente.

Sofia Mazullo (43): Your stepmother and owner of Mazullo’s Italian Restaurant.

“Uncle Frankie” Valente (46): Sal’s younger brother and top lieutenant. Always acted like your kind uncle.

Salvatore Valente (48): Don of the Valente Crime Family.
creator: Greatn
